challenge.title: Korak 28
challenge.description:
Da bi se obezbedilo da je tekst unet u input polja i tekstualne oblasti, kao i njihovi placeholderi, vidljiv, postavite im boju.

Izaberite input, input::placeholder, textarea i podesite color na whitesmoke.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Parent Teacher Conference Form

Please fill out the form below to help schedule your parent-teacher conference.

Student Information
Parent/Guardian Information
Preferred Contact Method
Additional Notes

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.testString:
const style = new __helpers.CSSHelp(document).getStyle('input, input::placeholder, textarea');
assert.strictEqual(style?.color, 'whitesmoke');
